title: picea abies var. pumila
intro: Picea abies var. pumila, also known as the dwarf Norway spruce, is a small shrub-like evergreen tree or a low-growing, spreading variety of the Norway spruce. The medicinal properties of Picea abies var. pumila include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which contribute to its use in herbal medicine. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Picea abies var. pumila can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of illness.
